evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Internally consistent v6 API usage: createUploadthing, createRouteHandler, generateUploadButton/Dropzone, UPLOADTHING_TOKEN env var, file.ufsUrl, FileRouter type. Version 6.x claimed and methods consistent throughout. Long-tail handling: consistent + version = 4.
evidence.executability: Main code blocks parse cleanly. However, app/layout.tsx is shown in three different overlapping variants (basic, with CSS-before-globals, with NextSSRPlugin) which the deterministic extractor would write all/last verbatim, potentially overwriting. ngrok pitfall mentioned in prose but not in a primary install/test bash block. Some non-obvious fixes required.
evidence.completeness: All six pieces present: (a) API key acquisition with URL/menu steps; (b) install bash block; (c) env template UPLOADTHING_TOKEN matches reference; (d) backend core.ts + route.ts; (e) frontend components + utils; (f) test commands present though more checklist than automated. Duplicate layout.tsx variants reduce score slightly.
evidence.citation_anchoring: docs.uploadthing.com official URLs cited inline [1][2][13] near relevant code sections, plus full source list at end. Matches canonical official domain.

rubric_notes: ngrok appears only in an optional pitfall note, not in a primary install/run block, so EXECUTABILITY cap at 2 not strictly triggered; scored 3 for layout.tsx duplication ambiguity. UploadThing not in canonical list but docs.uploadthing.com is the official domain.
